title: More Useful Stone
description:
Adds: Armor sets: Stone, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Sandstone, and Red Sandstone.

Tool sets: Stone, Granite, you get it. Every armor set except for red sandstone.
body:
# More useful stone

## This mod adds

Stone Armor

Granite armor and tools

Diorite armor and tools

Andesite armor and tools

Sandstone armor and tools

coded by: [DevonMK](https://modrinth.com/user/DevonMK)
he also has a curseforge [DevonMK](https://www.curseforge.com/members/devonmk/projects)
